'''varuthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zamboninite|zamboninite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zamboninite|zamboninite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| varuthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:værithith|værithith]] || [[word:værithij|værithij]] || [[word:værithish|værithish]] || [[word:værithi|værithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:varuruthuth|varuruthuth]] || [[word:varuruthuj|varuruthuj]] || [[word:varuruthush|varuruthush]] || [[word:varuruthu|varuruthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:varuthuth|varuthuth]] || [[word:varuthuj|varuthuj]] || [[word:varuthush|varuthush]] || [[word:varuthu|varuthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:varufthuth|varufthuth]] || [[word:varufthuj|varufthuj]] || [[word:varufthush|varufthush]] || [[word:varufthuf|varufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:varuthuthu|varuthuthu]] || [[word:varuthuju|varuthuju]] || [[word:varuthushu|varuthushu]] || [[word:varuthuku|varuthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:varuthuth|varuthuth]] || [[word:varuthuj|varuthuj]] || [[word:varuthush|varuthush]] || [[word:varuthu|varuthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:varuthuthul|varuthuthul]] || [[word:varuthujul|varuthujul]] || [[word:varuthushul|varuthushul]] || [[word:varuthukul|varuthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:varuthuthuthu|varuthuthuthu]] || [[word:varuthujuju|varuthujuju]] || [[word:varuthushushu|varuthushushu]] || [[word:varuthuku|varuthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:varuthuthun|varuthuthun]] || [[word:varuthujun|varuthujun]] || [[word:varuthushun|varuthushun]] || [[word:varuthukun|varuthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:varuthuthuoro|varuthuthuoro]] || [[word:varuthujuoro|varuthujuoro]] || [[word:varuthushuoro|varuthushuoro]] || [[word:varuthukuoro|varuthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
